title: spiraea chamaedryfolia var. ulmifolia
intro: Spiraea chamaedryfolia var. ulmifolia, also known as Ural spirea, is a deciduous shrub native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The health benefits of Ural spirea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Ural spirea include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
